### How was it tested?
- [ ] Manually tested (local/staging/preview)
- [ ] Unit tests added or updated
- [ ] Integration tests added or updated
- [ ] E2E tests run successfully
- [ ] Mobile tests (iOS / Android) executed (if applicable)

---

### Checklist

#### ✅ Code Quality
- [ ] Code follows project standards (biome, formatting, linting)
- [ ] Type safety verified (e.g., valibot + TypeScript)
- [ ] Clean, modular, and testable (SOLID, DRY)

#### ✅ Tests & CI
- [ ] All CI checks pass (unit/integration/E2E)
- [ ] Test coverage reviewed and adequate
- [ ] Behavior verified in all environments (local/staging/prod preview)

#### ✅ Observability & Stability
- [ ] Logs/metrics/traces added or updated (observability stack)
- [ ] No new runtime or Sentry errors
- [ ] GCP/K8s configs reviewed (if modified)
- [ ] ArgoCD sync and rollout validated

#### ✅ Platform & Release Readiness
- [ ] Mobile platforms verified (iOS / Android)
- [ ] App Store / Play Store compliance confirmed (if applicable)
- [ ] Stripe or payment logic verified (if touched)
- [ ] Analytics updated (e.g., Umami events)
- [ ] Feature flags configured and documented
- [ ] Documentation or README updated (if applicable)
